title: As the EU mulls over a fur ban, the Greek state wants to support a new mink farm [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Fur farming is collapsing across Europe. It's unprofitable, unwanted and condemned by science. So why is Greece planning a new farm for 29,000 mink, funded by taxpayers? With Brussels' decision weeks away, the case for a total ban has never been stronger.
